nodes.label: 澳洲咖啡店点单
nodes.description: 在澳洲咖啡店点单、寒暄、选择堂食或外带、付款时可直接套用的表达。

nodes.label: How ya going?
nodes.description: 非常澳洲的寒暄，相当于 How are you going? / How's it going?，语气随意。

nodes.label: Yeah, not too bad. Yourself?
nodes.description: 回答寒暄并自然反问对方，比 Not bad, are you? 更地道。

nodes.label: What can I get for ya?
nodes.description: 店员询问点单的高频说法。ya 是口语中的 you。

nodes.label: Can I get a medium oat latte, please?
nodes.description: 点咖啡的自然句型。oat latte 表示燕麦奶拿铁，不需要说 a cup of latte。

nodes.label: Any sugar?
nodes.description: 服务场景里询问是否加糖的简短表达；完整说法是 Would you like any sugar?

nodes.label: No thanks.
nodes.description: 拒绝加糖、袋子、收据等都可用。比 Not really, thanks 更自然。

nodes.label: For here or takeaway?
nodes.description: 澳洲常用 takeaway 表示外带；美国更常说 to go。

nodes.label: Takeaway, please.
nodes.description: 回答外带。澳洲场景避免使用 take out。

nodes.label: That’ll be six fifty.
nodes.description: 收银报金额的自然说法，$6.50 读作 six fifty。

nodes.label: Can I pay by card?
nodes.description: 询问是否可以刷卡/银行卡支付。口语中也可说 Card okay?

nodes.label: Yep, no worries.
nodes.description: 澳洲高频回应，表示当然可以、没问题。

nodes.label: 澳洲租房看房
nodes.description: 看房 inspection、确认预约、询问房租包含项目和下一步申请流程时可用的表达。

nodes.label: I'm here for the inspection.
nodes.description: 看房最常用说法。澳洲租房场景里 inspection 很高频。

nodes.label: Have you booked an inspection?
nodes.description: 询问是否预约过看房。比 Have you scheduled before? 更自然。

nodes.label: I booked the 2 pm inspection.
nodes.description: 说明自己预约了下午两点的看房。

nodes.label: This is a two-bedroom apartment.
nodes.description: 两室公寓的标准说法。不要直译成 two rooms and one living room。

nodes.label: Most of the furniture is included.
nodes.description: 家具基本包含。furniture 不可数，不加 s。

nodes.label: Are utilities included in the rent?
nodes.description: 询问水电网等是否包含在房租中。utilities 是租房高频词。

nodes.label: Is water and internet included in the rent?
nodes.description: 更具体地问水费和网络是否包含。澳洲说 internet，不说 network。

nodes.label: You'll need to set up your own internet.
nodes.description: 需要自己办理网络。set up internet 比 apply the network 自然。

nodes.label: What should I do next?
nodes.description: 询问下一步流程，简洁自然。

nodes.label: You’ll need to submit an application.
nodes.description: 提交租房申请。submit an application 是标准说法。

nodes.label: 澳洲银行开户
nodes.description: 银行开户、地址确认、签证材料、账户类型和银行卡邮寄相关表达。

nodes.label: I'd like to open a bank account.
nodes.description: 银行开户的标准开场。也可以说 I’m looking to open an account。

nodes.label: Do you currently have an Australian address?
nodes.description: 银行询问澳洲地址。避免 May I know do you... 这种亚洲英语结构。

nodes.label: I recently rented a place.
nodes.description: 表达刚租好住处。place 在口语里可泛指住的地方。

nodes.label: I'll also need your passport and visa.
nodes.description: 银行工作人员说明还需要护照和签证。

nodes.label: Is an electronic visa okay?
nodes.description: 询问电子签证是否可以。digital visa 也可用。

nodes.label: Would you like a savings account or a transaction account?
nodes.description: 澳洲常见账户类型：savings account 和 transaction account。注意 savings 有 s。

nodes.label: Just a transaction account for now.
nodes.description: 先开日常消费账户。for now 表示暂时先这样。

nodes.label: We'll mail your debit card to your address.
nodes.description: 银行卡会邮寄到地址。澳洲日常消费卡通常说 debit card。

nodes.label: within a few business days
nodes.description: 几个工作日内。银行、物流、行政场景高频。

nodes.label: 澳洲健身房咨询
nodes.description: 健身房会员、trial pass、开门关门时间和体验课程相关表达。

nodes.label: I'd like to ask about your membership plans.
nodes.description: 咨询会员方案。澳洲健身房说 membership，不说 VIP plans。

nodes.label: Have you been here before?
nodes.description: 前台询问是否来过。自然且常见。

nodes.label: I recently moved nearby.
nodes.description: 表示最近搬到附近。

nodes.label: We offer both monthly and yearly memberships.
nodes.description: 月付和年付会员方案。也可说 monthly and annual memberships。

nodes.label: Do you offer a free trial?
nodes.description: 询问是否有免费体验。比 have a trial 更自然。

nodes.label: We offer a free trial pass.
nodes.description: 健身房提供免费体验券/体验资格。

nodes.label: What time does the gym usually close?
nodes.description: 询问健身房通常几点关门。

nodes.label: It closes at 10 pm on weekdays, and a bit earlier on weekends.
nodes.description: 说明工作日和周末关门时间。a bit earlier 很自然。

nodes.label: I'll give it a try today.
nodes.description: 今天先试一下。比 I'll have a trial today 更口语。

nodes.label: month-to-month membership
nodes.description: 澳洲健身房常见说法，表示按月、通常没有长期锁定的会员方案。

nodes.label: 澳洲办公室午休闲聊
nodes.description: 同事之间约午饭、点咖啡、聊加班和项目忙碌程度的办公室口语。

nodes.label: Any lunch plans today?
nodes.description: 问今天午饭有什么安排。比 What do you plan to eat this noon? 自然。

nodes.label: I might just grab something quick.
nodes.description: 随便快速买点吃的。grab something quick 是办公室高频。

nodes.label: A new Thai place just opened downstairs.
nodes.description: 楼下新开了一家泰餐店。place 可口语化表示餐厅。

nodes.label: Keen to try it?
nodes.description: 想试试吗？keen 是澳洲口语高频词。

nodes.label: I'm not really into spicy food.
nodes.description: 我不太能/不太喜欢吃辣。比 I cannot eat too spicy 自然。

nodes.label: They’ve got non-spicy options too.
nodes.description: 他们也有不辣的选择。options 比 food not spicy 更自然。

nodes.label: I also wanna grab a coffee while we're there.
nodes.description: 顺便买杯咖啡。grab a coffee 是高频搭配。

nodes.label: Have you been working overtime lately?
nodes.description: 你最近经常加班吗？overtime 不需要连字符。

nodes.label: We've been pretty flat out lately.
nodes.description: 我们最近特别忙。flat out 是澳洲常用表达。

nodes.label: The project’s been pretty hectic lately.
nodes.description: 项目最近挺赶/挺乱。hectic 表示忙乱、节奏很紧。

nodes.label: 澳洲超市退货
nodes.description: 退货、换货、退款、小票、商品故障和等待处理时可用的表达。

nodes.label: I'd like to return this item.
nodes.description: 退货的标准说法。不要说 refund this good。

nodes.label: What seems to be the problem?
nodes.description: 服务人员询问商品有什么问题。也可说 What's wrong with it?

nodes.label: I took it home yesterday and realised it was faulty.
nodes.description: 昨天买回家后发现有故障。faulty 是澳洲退货场景高频词。

nodes.label: Do you have a receipt?
nodes.description: 你有小票吗？receipt 是退货必备词。

nodes.label: Yep, here it is.
nodes.description: 有，在这里。也可以说 Sure, here you go。

nodes.label: We can give you a refund or exchange it for a new one.
nodes.description: 可以退款或换新。exchange it for a new one 是正确搭配。

nodes.label: Could I get a new one instead?
nodes.description: 那我换一个新的吧。instead 表示改选这个方案。

nodes.label: I'll take a replacement, please.
nodes.description: 我选择换货/替换件。replacement 是退换货高频词。

nodes.label: Just give me a moment.
nodes.description: 请稍等一下。服务场景比 wait a second please 自然。

nodes.label: store credit
nodes.description: 店铺余额/购物金；有些退货政策不退现金，只给 store credit。

nodes.label: return policy
nodes.description: 退货政策。购物、退货、客服场景高频。

nodes.label: 和同事确认需求
nodes.description: 确认功能能否完成、API 细节、权限逻辑和 PM 同步时的工程团队表达。

nodes.label: Do you think you can finish this feature today?
nodes.description: 比 Can you finish this feature today? 更委婉，适合职场。

nodes.label: I should be able to.
nodes.description: 表达应该可以，比 It could be 自然。

nodes.label: I still need to check a few things with the API.
nodes.description: 还需要确认 API 的一些细节。比 confirm an API 更准确。

nodes.label: Which part is unclear?
nodes.description: 问哪一部分不清楚。

nodes.label: The user permission logic is still a bit unclear.
nodes.description: 用户权限逻辑还不清晰。permission logic 是工程团队高频。

nodes.label: Maybe sync with the PM this afternoon.
nodes.description: 下午和 PM 对一下。sync with 是团队沟通高频。

nodes.label: I'll continue working on it once I've clarified that part.
nodes.description: 确认那部分后继续开发。clarify that part 比 once I've confirmed 更完整。

nodes.label: Stand-up 日常站会
nodes.description: 汇报昨天做了什么、进展、旧代码问题、上线影响和补测试时的表达。

nodes.label: What did you work on yesterday?
nodes.description: 站会问昨天做了什么的自然表达。

nodes.label: I finished refactoring the login module yesterday.
nodes.description: 完成登录模块重构。比 refactoring work of the login module 更自然。

nodes.label: How's it going?
nodes.description: 询问进展。比 How's the progress? 更口语。

nodes.label: Overall it's been pretty smooth.
nodes.description: 整体还算顺利。

nodes.label: I found a few issues in the legacy code.
nodes.description: 发现旧代码里有一些问题。legacy code 是开发高频词。

nodes.label: Will this affect this week's release?
nodes.description: 会影响这周上线吗？release 比 deployment 更贴近上线计划。

nodes.label: I'll continue working on the fixes and add more test coverage today.
nodes.description: 今天继续修复并补测试覆盖。test coverage 是专业表达。

nodes.label: Code Review 后讨论问题
nodes.description: PR review 后询问修改点、性能问题、service 职责和拆分逻辑时的表达。

nodes.label: I just had a look at your PR.
nodes.description: 刚看了你的 PR。had a look at 比 reviewed 更口语。

nodes.label: Anything I should fix?
nodes.description: 有什么需要我改的吗？比 is there anything need to change? 自然。

nodes.label: Overall it looks good.
nodes.description: 整体看起来没什么问题。Code Review 高频开场。

nodes.label: There are still a few areas we could improve.
nodes.description: 有几个地方还可以优化。areas we could improve 比 points could be optimized 更自然。

nodes.label: Is it a performance issue?
nodes.description: 是性能问题吗？

nodes.label: This service has too many responsibilities.
nodes.description: 这个 service 职责太多。注意 service has。

nodes.label: This service is handling too much logic.
nodes.description: 这个 service 承担了太多逻辑。架构讨论中很自然。

nodes.label: I'll split the logic up later.
nodes.description: 我晚点把逻辑拆分一下。split up 是自然动词短语。

nodes.label: I'll refactor it a bit further.
nodes.description: 我会再进一步重构一下。

graphs.graphLabel: 和 Tech Lead 讨论架构

nodes.label: 和 Tech Lead 讨论架构
nodes.description: 讨论 controller 业务逻辑、快速实现、可维护性、service 层拆分和抽象时的表达。

nodes.label: I had a look at your implementation.
nodes.description: 我看了你的实现。比 this time 更自然，不需要额外补 this time。

nodes.label: There's one thing I'm a bit concerned about.
nodes.description: 有一点我有些担心。职场里更委婉。

nodes.label: There seems to be too much business logic in the controller.
nodes.description: controller 里好像有太多业务逻辑。business logic 不可数。

nodes.label: I just wanted to get the feature done quickly.
nodes.description: 当时只是想快速把功能做出来。get the feature done 比 develop the feature 更自然。

nodes.label: I was trying to ship it quickly.
nodes.description: 我当时想快速交付/上线。ship 在软件团队里很高频。

nodes.label: It could cause maintainability issues later.
nodes.description: 后面可能会带来可维护性问题。maintainability 是架构讨论高频词。

nodes.label: Should we move it into the service layer?
nodes.description: 是否应该移到 service 层？move into 比 separate to 正确。

nodes.label: Should we extract this into a separate service?
nodes.description: 是否应该抽到单独 service？extract 是重构高频词。

nodes.label: Some of the logic could be abstracted further.
nodes.description: 部分逻辑可以进一步抽象。logic 不可数。

nodes.label: I'll clean this part up later.
nodes.description: 我晚点清理/重构这一块。clean up 是开发团队高频。

nodes.label: Sprint Planning 讨论任务
nodes.description: 评估任务耗时、API 变更、风险点、数据不一致、测试阶段问题和 estimate 的表达。

nodes.label: How long do you think this will take?
nodes.description: 这个任务你觉得需要多久？避免 how long can finish 结构。

nodes.label: What's your estimate for this task?
nodes.description: 这个任务你的估算是多少？Agile 场景非常常用。

nodes.label: Assuming there are no API changes, it should take around two days.
nodes.description: 如果 API 没变，大概两天。assuming... 是估算前提的自然说法。

nodes.label: Any risks?
nodes.description: 有什么风险点吗？简短自然。

nodes.label: Any blockers?
nodes.description: 有没有阻塞点？blocker 是工程团队高频。

nodes.label: The legacy system uses inconsistent data formats.
nodes.description: 旧系统数据格式不统一。inconsistent data formats 是准确表达。

nodes.label: Should we sync with the backend team first?
nodes.description: 是否需要先和后端团队确认？sync with 高频。

nodes.label: Otherwise we might run into issues during testing.
nodes.description: 不然测试阶段可能会遇到问题。run into issues 很自然。

nodes.label: Let's put this into the current sprint for now.
nodes.description: 那先把这个任务放到当前 sprint。for now 表示暂时这样安排。

nodes.label: I'll update the estimate later.
nodes.description: 我等会儿更新 estimate。自然且常用。

graphs.graphLabel: 和 PM 讨论需求变更

nodes.label: 和 PM 讨论需求变更
nodes.description: 客户新增需求、小改动、现有逻辑影响、RBAC、数据结构、前端改动、上线时间和影响范围评估。

nodes.label: The client just brought up a new requirement.
nodes.description: 客户刚提了一个新需求。brought up 比 pull a requirement 自然。

nodes.label: Is it a minor change, or will it affect the current logic?
nodes.description: 是小改动，还是会影响当前逻辑？

nodes.label: It might affect the current logic.
nodes.description: 可能会影响当前逻辑。这里用 affect 或 impact 都可以。

nodes.label: They want us to support role-based access control.
nodes.description: 他们希望支持多角色权限。工程里常说 RBAC / role-based access control。

nodes.label: We might need to adjust the current data structure.
nodes.description: 现有数据结构可能需要调整。

nodes.label: The frontend team will probably need to make quite a few changes as well.
nodes.description: 前端那边应该也要改不少东西。make quite a few changes 很自然。

nodes.label: Is there a timeline for this requirement?
nodes.description: 这个需求有确定时间线吗？timeline 比 deadline 更适合问计划。

nodes.label: The client wants this done as soon as possible.
nodes.description: 客户希望越快越好。

nodes.label: I'll estimate the effort first.
nodes.description: 我先评估工作量。effort 是估算工作量的常用词。

nodes.label: I'll assess the impact scope first.
nodes.description: 我先评估影响范围。impact scope 比 influence range 正确。
